title: A Landfill in Indonesia Caught Fire Over a Week Ago. It’s Still Burning.
summary_full: Toxic fumes have sickened nearby residents. Lawmakers and activists say the blaze is an indication of the country’s longstanding issues with waste management.
summary_public: Toxic fumes have sickened nearby residents. Lawmakers and activists say the blaze is an indication of the country’s longstanding issues with waste management.
